text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as I finish telling <chrname> to<n>take a break
during training...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You two are doing such a great job.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oops. I didn't mean to startle<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I always get this urge to encourage<n>others when
I see them working hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right! Let me know if I can help<n>with anything,
okay?
choice_data_list: We wouldn't want to bother you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! ♪ Come on now, you<n>can ask me
for anything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The overwhelming eagerness in<n>Super Creek's
eyes leaves me with<n>no choice but to oblige.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to think of what I want to<n>ask her for
first though...
choice_data_list: Could you give me some pointers on training?
Would you like to train with us?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I would suggest you go<n>easy on your
racer every once in a<n>while.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's important to work hard, but she<n>won't be
able to keep it up if you're<n>too strict on her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'd love to! ♪ If you don't mind,<n>let's follow
my training program.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We end up doing some super heavy<n>weight
training with Super Creek.
